name: White Chocolate and Peppermint Creams
recipeIngredient: 48 small paper or colored foil candy cups
1 lb plus 6 oz imported white chocolate (such as Lindt)
1 cup hard peppermint candies, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide candy cups between 2 cookie sheets and set aside.
2. Bring cream to a simmer in a heavy medium saucepan. Remove from heat.
3. Add white chocolate; whisk until melted and smooth. Whisk in candies and peppermint extract.
4. Working quickly, spoon the mixture into a pastry bag fitted with a medium round tip.
5. Pipe the mixture into candy cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
6. Wet fingertips and press down on the candy mixture to smooth tops. Refrigerate until set, about 15 minutes.
7. Melt remaining chocolate in a metal bowl over simmering water. Remove from heat.
8. Spoon generous amount of melted white chocolate onto each of the cooled candy cups. Shake gently to smooth tops and decorate with candied violet. Chill until set, about 1 hour.
9. Melt bittersweet chocolate in a metal bowl over simmering water. Spoon generous amount onto remaining candy cups. Shake gently to smooth tops and decorate with candied violet. Chill until set.
Served cold. Candied violets can be found at many cookware stores or specialty foods stores, or ordered by mail from Mr. K's Gourmet Foods (213-934-9117). These treats can be prepared up to 2 weeks in advance and stored refrigerated in an airtight container.
